canonical_strict_valid.description: Primary public benchmark headline set (strict-valid canonical examples).

public_mixed.description: Mixed public examples (strict-valid + non-strict-only), clearly labeled as mixed.

compatibility_only.description: Compatibility-oriented examples only (non-strict/legacy classes). Not a headline set.

full_multitarget.description: Measure AINL source size vs aggregate generated output across all benchmark targets (including hybrid langgraph/temporal wrappers).

full_multitarget_core.description: Same as full_multitarget but only the six compiler-backed emitters (excludes standalone langgraph/temporal wrapper scripts). Comparable to pre-hybrid headline ratios.

minimal_emit.description: Count only generated targets required by artifact capabilities for fairer practical comparison.

handwritten_baselines.note: Framework scaffold is ready; handwritten baseline programs can be added incrementally.
